---
title: "main.tsx"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/vis/main.tsx"
loc: 6
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.57
style_score: 9.54
intel_score: 8.07
overall_score: 9.08
---

## Intent
React component rendering main.

## Interaction Protocol
Include <main /> within a React-Three-Fiber Canvas context.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://react)
- [*](file://react-dom/client)
- [App](file://./App.ts)

### Exports
Internal logic only.
